Package com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

Class SchemaBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.SchemaBuilder
  • public class SchemaBuilder
extends Object
    Builder for constructing Schema objects. This builder can be used independently or as part of other builders like FunctionDeclarationBuilder and GenerationConfigBuilder.
    Since:
    0.0.2
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      SchemaBuilder​(FunctionDeclarationBuilder functionDeclarationBuilder)
      Constructor for the SchemaBuilder used by FunctionDeclarationBuilder.
      SchemaBuilder​(GenerationConfigBuilder generationConfigBuilder)
      Constructor for the SchemaBuilder used by GenerationConfigBuilder.
      SchemaBuilder​(SchemaBuilder schemaBuilder)
      Constructor for the SchemaBuilder used by another SchemaBuilder (for nested items).

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Object and()
      Returns to the parent builder, setting the built Schema instance as appropriate.
      Schema build()
      Builds a Schema instance based on the configured parameters.
      SchemaBuilder withDescription​(String description)
      Sets the description for the schema.
      SchemaBuilder withEnumValue​(String enumValue)
      Adds an enum value to the list of enum values for the schema.
      SchemaBuilder withFormat​(String format)
      Sets the format for the schema.
      SchemaBuilder withItems()
      Creates a new SchemaBuilder for building the schema for array items.
      SchemaBuilder withItems​(Schema items)
      Sets the schema for the items in an array schema.
      SchemaBuilder withNullable​(Boolean nullable)
      Sets the nullable flag for the schema.
      TypeBuilder withType()
      Creates a new TypeBuilder for building the schema type.
      SchemaBuilder withType​(Type type)
      Sets the type for the schema.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • SchemaBuilder

        public SchemaBuilder​(FunctionDeclarationBuilder functionDeclarationBuilder)
        Constructor for the SchemaBuilder used by FunctionDeclarationBuilder.
        Parameters:
        functionDeclarationBuilder - The parent FunctionDeclarationBuilder instance.

      • SchemaBuilder

        public SchemaBuilder​(GenerationConfigBuilder generationConfigBuilder)
        Constructor for the SchemaBuilder used by GenerationConfigBuilder.
        Parameters:
        generationConfigBuilder - The parent GenerationConfigBuilder instance.

      • SchemaBuilder

        public SchemaBuilder​(SchemaBuilder schemaBuilder)
        Constructor for the SchemaBuilder used by another SchemaBuilder (for nested items).
        Parameters:
        schemaBuilder - The parent SchemaBuilder instance.

    • Method Detail

      • withType

        public SchemaBuilder withType​(Type type)
        Sets the type for the schema.
        Parameters:
        type - The type of the schema.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withType

        public TypeBuilder withType()
        Creates a new TypeBuilder for building the schema type.
        Returns:
        A new TypeBuilder instance.

      • withFormat

        public SchemaBuilder withFormat​(String format)
        Sets the format for the schema.
        Parameters:
        format - The format of the schema.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withDescription

        public SchemaBuilder withDescription​(String description)
        Sets the description for the schema.
        Parameters:
        description - The description of the schema.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withNullable

        public SchemaBuilder withNullable​(Boolean nullable)
        Sets the nullable flag for the schema.
        Parameters:
        nullable - Whether the schema can be null.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withEnumValue

        public SchemaBuilder withEnumValue​(String enumValue)
        Adds an enum value to the list of enum values for the schema.
        Parameters:
        enumValue - The enum value to add.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withItems

        public SchemaBuilder withItems​(Schema items)
        Sets the schema for the items in an array schema.
        Parameters:
        items - The schema for the array items.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withItems

        public SchemaBuilder withItems()
        Creates a new SchemaBuilder for building the schema for array items.
        Returns:
        A new SchemaBuilder instance.

      • build

        public Schema build()
        Builds a Schema instance based on the configured parameters.
        Returns:
        The built Schema instance.

      • and

        public Object and()
        Returns to the parent builder, setting the built Schema instance as appropriate.
        Returns:
        The parent builder instance for method chaining.
